query:
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN descriptionEs IS NULL OR descriptionEs = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as cases_no_desc_es,
  SUM(CASE WHEN legalBasisEs IS NULL OR legalBasisEs = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as cases_no_legal_es,
  SUM(CASE WHEN procedureEs IS NULL OR procedureEs = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as cases_no_proc_es,
  SUM(CASE WHEN examplesEs IS NULL OR examplesEs = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as cases_no_ex_es
FROM special_cases;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user qC6e8XA9uYDpdWY.4aab5d30693d --database DirVLPm6UeFJi3utFGbgZe --execute SELECT

  SUM(CASE WHEN legalBasisEs IS NULL OR legalBasisEs = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as cases_no_legal_es,
  SUM(CASE WHEN procedureEs IS NULL OR procedureEs = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as cases_no_proc_es,
  SUM(CASE WHEN examplesEs IS NULL OR examplesEs = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as cases_no_ex_es
FROM special_cases;
